_comment: RAT auditlog/v1 conformance vectors. The records are core-SIGNED and chain-linked, so the scenario is built + signed at run time by the harness (it plays the core, holding the Ed25519 private key; the sink holds only the public key). This file pins the axis and documents the expected per-step acks the harness asserts. Properties under test (freeze-blocker #4): signature-verify, prev_hash chain-check, prefix-only commit, idempotent-duplicate.
